title: Trace a UI that will not update
description: Follow a stale widget back to mutation outside the update path or state placed where it cannot trigger a rebuild.
body: Steps: 1. Confirm the underlying state value actually changed. 2. Check how the change is applied: was it inside setState (or pushed through the state-management notifier), or mutated in place outside any update path. 3. Verify the widget reading the state is a descendant that actually rebuilds when that state changes (correct Provider/listener wiring). 4. Move the mutation into the framework's update path or fix the listener scope. 5. Re-test. Rollback point: before relocating state ownership. Validation: a widget test shows the UI updates after the state change, and the rebuild profiler confirms the right widget rebuilt.
